seoTitle: Sandy Hollow vs Sandy Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandy Hollow and Sandy Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sandy Hollow vs Sandy Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandy Hollow and Sandy Point.
heading: Sandy Hollow vs Sandy Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandy Hollow, New South Wales and Sandy Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Hollow has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Sandy Point (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandy Hollow or Sandy Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandy Hollow has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Sandy Point scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandy Hollow scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Sandy Point scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandy Hollow or Sandy Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Hollow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
